name: SentinelOne Agents Actively Reporting
description: Ensures SentinelOne agents are installed and actively reporting on all endpoints
query: SELECT id, computer_name, os_name, last_active_date FROM sentinelone_agents WHERE is_active = false OR last_active_date < DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
remediation: Investigate stale SentinelOne agents. Reinstall agent or remove device from inventory if no longer in use.
